prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约12892名、12820名、12466名、14955名、11784名。2024年位次大幅后移至14955名，2025年强势回升至11784名，创近五年最佳，波动幅度较大（约3200名），反映该校在浙江的报考热度存在明显大小年特征；该校在浙江综合类招生计划逐年缩减：2021年190人→2022年176人→2023年174人→2024年172人→2025年165人→2026年164人。2026年较2025年微减1人（-0.6%），缩招幅度极小，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中南大学是985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第27名（近年稳定在23–27名区间），属于国内顶尖高校梯队，对浙江考生有较强吸引力；2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及原校长张尧学涉嫌严重违纪违法被查的学术不端事件；2024–2025年亦有偏负面信号（录取断档现象）。抖音热度总排名第85位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未出现高热关注。整体声誉对报考热度有轻微抑制作用；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共13个：冶金工程A+、护理学A+、材料科学与工程A、临床医学A-、交通运输工程A-、计算机科学与技术A-、机械工程A-、土木工程A-等。医学、材料、计算机等强势学科与浙江考生青睐的热门专业方向高度契合。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程为高热推荐；临床医学、口腔医学为推荐；土木建筑、生化环材为明显劝退。中南大学招生专业覆盖上述热冷门方向，热门专业占比提升有助于吸引高分考生。浙江省考生总数从2025年约29.1万大幅增至2026年约40.0万（+37.6%），竞争显著加剧；中南大学位于湖南省长沙市，非浙江本省高校，无本地招生倾斜。该校在浙江招生计划约占总计划较小比例（2025年全国计划约8000余人，浙江165人约占2%），属跨省招生，地域偏好因素中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次11784名、2026年计划微缩0.6%、浙江省考生规模大幅增长37.6%（竞争加剧）、声誉偏负面轻微抑制热度等因素，预计2026年录取位次在2025年基础上小幅前移（更难进）。预测最低录取位次约11711名，波动区间11211–12211名。

一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制）
- 口腔医学（5+3一体化）
- 计算机科学与技术（拔尖基地班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）

- 计算机类
- 电子信息类
- 自动化类（自动化与电气类）
- 数学类
- 软件工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

- 土木类（土木安全类）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约11711名，区间11211–12211名。位次在区间上限（12211名）附近建议以三档专业保底、二档为主；位次在区间中段（11700名左右）可重点选择二档热门专业（计算机类、电子信息类、自动化类）；位次在区间下限（11211名以内）可冲刺一档王牌专业（临床医学八年制、口腔5+3、计算机拔尖班）。中南大学医学、计算机、材料等优势学科实力突出，建议结合个人兴趣和学科评估等级综合选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang Comprehensive category were approximately 12892, 12820, 12466, 14955, and 11784 respectively. In 2024, the ranking significantly dropped to 14955, but rebounded strongly to 11784 in 2025, the best in five years, with a fluctuation range of about 3200 places, reflecting a clear odd-even year pattern in application popularity at this university in Zhejiang. The enrollment plan for Comprehensive category in Zhejiang has been decreasing year by year: 190 in 2021 → 176 in 2022 → 174 in 2023 → 172 in 2024 → 165 in 2025 → 164 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a slight decrease of 1 person (-0.6%), a very small reduction that has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central South University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 27th (stable in the 23–27 range in recent years), belonging to the top tier of domestic universities, which strongly attracts Zhejiang candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the former president Zhang Yaoxue being investigated for serious disciplinary violations related to academic misconduct. There were also somewhat negative signals in 2024–2025 (admission gaps). Its Douyin popularity ranks 85th overall (rated 'average'), with short video exposure at a moderate level, not generating high attention. Overall, the reputation has a slight inhibitory effect on application popularity. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 13 disciplines rated A- or above: Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Transportation Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Civil Engineering A-, etc. Strong disciplines such as medicine, materials, and computer science align well with the popular majors favored by Zhejiang candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering are highly recommended; Clinical Medicine, Stomatology are recommended; Civil Engineering/Architecture, Biology/Chemistry/Environment/Materials are clearly discouraged. Central South University's enrollment majors cover these hot and cold directions, and an increased proportion of popular majors helps attract high-scoring candidates. The total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province has increased significantly from about 291,000 in 2025 to about 400,000 in 2026 (+37.6%), intensifying competition. Central South University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, not a local university in Zhejiang, so there is no local enrollment preference. Its enrollment plan in Zhejiang accounts for a relatively small proportion of the total plan (in 2025, the national plan was about 8,000+, with 165 in Zhejiang accounting for about 2%), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with neutral geographic preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11784, a 0.6% slight reduction in the 2026 plan, a significant 37.6% increase in the number of Zhejiang candidates (intensified competition), and a slightly negative reputation that mildly suppresses popularity, it is expected that the 2026 admission ranking will move slightly forward (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 11711, with a fluctuation range of 11211–12211.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (8-year program)
- Stomatology (5+3 integrated program)
- Computer Science and Technology (Elite Base Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Law
- Computer Science
- Electronic Information
- Automation (Automation and Electrical)
- Mathematics
- Software Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Materials (Metallurgy and Materials)
- Civil Engineering (Civil and Safety)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical (Chemistry, Biology, Environment)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Rail Transit Infrastructure and Safety).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 11711, range 11211–12211. Candidates near the upper limit of the range (12211) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety and focus on Tier 2. Candidates in the middle of the range (around 11700) can focus on popular Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation). Candidates near the lower limit of the range (within 11211) can aim for top Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine 8-year, Stomatology 5+3, Computer Elite Class). Central South University has strong advantages in medicine, computer science, and materials. It is recommended to choose based on personal interests and discipline evaluation grades.
